Every time I click a to go back a little bit the screen turns all black. Some advice for other people while waiting for it to be fixed I just uninstalled the game and reinstalled it really quickly because it is not a big size. But other than that it is an awesome game don’t stop the good work.

People keep calling me names and calling me a n word and bullying for my name I had to Chang it because every lobby I went into I got bullied for the name and for being the only girl I tried reporting them but they did not get banned :(

developer_response.body: We are sorry to hear that! We have strict rules and ban users who bring this kind of behaviour to our multiplayer lobbies. We also have a mute button so you can mute those who are not being friendly, but don't forget to also report them.

reviews.review_description: I love this game so much. I love skiing and it also helps calm me with my depression. It’s so relaxing and I love it.

The first time i played the free trial i thought this would be the best game ever, but then i bought it and there was so much bug. This might just be me but every time i pick my secleted ride choice it switch and mid way down a hill it pauses my whole game to switch to a different ride. This game would be a five star if you fixed thia.(I am only rating this 5 star so people can see it)

developer_response.body: It seems your left thumbstick has some drift. You can fix this by using the Meta deadzone settings on your controller, or you can use our input mapping on our in-game menu to change the gear selection to some other button! Happy shredding!

reviews.review_description: Honestly, this game is a five but I feel like they need to work on all the people that are just saying slurs in lobbies and that’s just annoying but if they got you like that easily five stars fantastic game ￼￼

I love your game but I notice the game doesn’t get updated very often and there are a lot of bugs that need to be addressed like the fact that I can’t join private servers, it just says “room is full” no matter how long and excessive the code is.

I've been playing sense about late 2022 while it was still on side quest. It has 4 different boards you can use. The snowskate is my favorite; it has the properties of a snowboard, but it's smaller and lighter to move. You can jump off of it without it going away, just like a skateboard.

I love the game. I love the graphics and I love ￼how you can change your avatar. I love how you can even walk. I love how you can be records. Everyone is basically like really nice and I love that there’s tutorials and it really makes the game fun and I don’t know if there’s any moderators but moderators are also really cool and I’m trying to get really active in the game and really good so yeah love the game I might make content

Best game to chill on after school just so good but the amount of times i get bullied in lobbys for bieng british is discusting  i get called british boy bottle of waurta scouzer london boy stabber and people tel me to get off get a life and the amount of times i see other people getting bullied for bieng british is horrible

I got voice banned just for saying a funny dark humoured joke and while I’ll was voice banned I heard someone say racial slurs and they never got banned 

The system is horrible

developer_response.body:
Hi xstz. 
We take it very seriously to protect our community against offenses. 
We can make sure anyone saying slurs will be voice muted because of that. 
If you want to appeal, please use the official Discord channel (you can press the button on the in-game menu to open it).

I tried every snowboard app, and this is one of the best: the feeling of speed, the radio, the huge customization for the player but especially for the environment (light filters, sun orientation and time of day...). 
Its main feature, however, is multiplayer! Slowp is greatly community driven: you can make custom levels and -while i'm writing- there's 67 official tracks and more than 2000 community levels (and some are really gorgeous)!
If you want some gameplay: 
https://youtu.be/QkWrvXeCQIY
Slowp made me feel like i was actually snowboarding five stars .
Soooo chill

This is pretty helpful for learning as well as just having fun snowboarding.  Thanks for creating this game, it runs really well, looks good enough, and is very customizable.  This is a very good game regarding it’s gameplay.  I’m alright with the textures, it allows for some creative freedom and I’ve seen some really cool maps.  Definitely a 5 star experience, this is exactly what I want out of a game like this.

reviews.review_description: This game is a bit glitchy but you can go on settings and play on settings

I love this game dont get me wrong, but needs work. You can fall through holes in maps, some maps dont “bake”, and is glitchy. I absolutely hate it when i fall through the holes in the map. Im just skiing along when BAM im under the map because i fell through. That is the biggest reason this only gets a 4. The second reason is if i want to play a map under the “levels” section i have to hope and pray that it “bakes” or else its all pitch black. If this was fixed the game would be much much better. It is very frustrating for this to happen.

developer_response.body:
Hi, I'm sorry you're having trouble with the baking. There shouldn't be any holes on maps unless they are there on purpose. Was that on community-made maps?
When the map is pitch black (which is a known bug), try opening the menu, then Explore > Level Options > Randomize Sun and Mood. It should fix the map for that run!

reviews.review_description: It was a better game when I first got it but once the physics update hit it felt so weird and no not Hasana player

developer_response.body: Hey, our last update has really messed up the physics, but we released a hotfix the day after. Did it make it better for you?

reviews.review_description: This game is almost perfect! However, I would love to see one thing added. I would love to see other types of movement! The current movement is spectacular but I feel there could be other types of movement too. For example, one where you control the way you turn with your head and use poles in your hands (controllers) to go faster. Overall this is a really good game but could benefit from a few improvements.

developer_response.body: Hey thank you so much for your feedback! We will be studying more forms of movement and new gears that implement more ways of riding too

Can't stop playing! This game is my favorite vr game right now 

If you haven't bought it yet I would 100% do so
The free trial made me want more and I bought it right once the trial was over



BEST CHEAP VR GAME OUT THERE👍

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for this awesome review 🙌

reviews.review_title: OMG this is the definition of fun!
reviews.review_description: I rarely write reviews, but here I am... I downloaded the trial thinking it would be silly and boring and I was WRONG AF. Shredding on a snow board in VR was so fun that when my trial ended I immediately purchased the game, and told my friends... Sometimes I wish there was a PCVR version with higher graphics, but man, you really lose yourself in this game. I read that the developer started making this during the pandemic, and I am more than happy to support all that work. Can't wait to see the game grow with the community!

It's so fun and addicting! Graphics are beautiful and smooth, maps - AMAZING! I love this game so much, i got it when I was free somewhere about 11 months ago. I kinda just sometimes get confused by those people that absolutely FLY when you start sledding though? They fly from start, anyways AMAZING GAME!

developer_response.body: Hey thank you for the amazing review. Those flying players are abusing glitch, we do delete those replays and ban those players from submitting new scores. Anytime you see a replay doing that please report to us on our discord. Have fun!

reviews.review_description: G

developer_response.body: We love that you love, why the 1 star though? 😭

reviews.review_description:
Great looking game, feels and plays well, sound effects and music are awesome.
But multiplayer needs fixing.
Firstly the room codes are overly and unnecessarily complicated.
Secondly there is no real race, you should be held at the start line with a 3,2,1 countdown then race.
On another note most maps are terrible, a third are too complicated another third are just a mess. User made maps are even worse. I had a go at building a map myself but couldn't seem to upload the file.
Maps need to be simple but fun, no falling off the edge or in holes, just a nice track with multiple routes down where risks equal rewards

developer_response.body:
Hi Kevin thank you for your feedback! 
We hear you, the codes are indeed overcomplicated we will improve that experience! 
Also, races and more game modes are something we aim for in the future. 

Could you tell us which official levels you like? Even if just a few, it would be nice to know so we can create more like those.

reviews.review_description: When I first got this I wasn’t that good, but as I kept playing i got better and the maps are really creative and so fun to play. The community is really nice and teach you how to play if you ask

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review. Seeing how players like you have fun with Slowp is the fuel that makes us constantly work on updates 🙌.

reviews.review_description: Ok hear me out the game is amazing. Many people love snowboarding and skiing so the developers just though while playing trackmania "huh, this is sick what if we made this into my favourite sport snowboarding and let's also add skiing" yes I agree make it. Many people would like it it's just when it comes to records being saved. I literally beat the best score for the first slope many times and it didn't save because I was one internet bar low down till I was full. Then I did it with full bars and it still didn't save, and my friend plays this so much that he did send me a couple recordings of him beating them and his score wasn't the world records (that's who he beat). Apart from that the movement is a bit glitchy but most of the time fine so it's a good game but just don't hope to get onto the leaderboard anytime soon. This review was for single player.

developer_response.body: Hi, I'm sorry you are having trouble getting to the leaderboards. Did you get any errors while finishing the map? Those errors usually appear on the HUD, like  "replay couldn't be uploaded" written in red. Please consider joining our discord for support: bit.ly/slowp-discord

reviews.review_description:
As one of the first players i can say this game has its ups and downs
To start i can critique the use of ai in both board skins and cover art, it may not be appealing to more mainstream audiences and may look tackier 
However this is probably planned to change as it is only a small indie game and is in active development
Secondly, an extremely large portion of the community is immature children and people who abuse the bugs that come with a game that depends so much on physics.
This is also being worked on with moderation but may continue to be one of its most major flaws
Lastly the game can be offputting because of the learning curve it take to manually control the board with its movement systems, which has shown to put some players off
Now the positive:
•As the game is in active development, the CM and one of the devs bunnyjoker is extremely active and responsive in the community and all the devs are working in the best interest if the playerbase
•active moderation has proven to greatly reduce the toxicity and made the game accessible community-wise to a large range of ages
•the physics, quality and frequency of updates has shown to be much stringer than both popular and niche vr games
•the roadmap and plans ahead are always extremely transparent with open public testing programmes and lots of QOL updates and bugfixes
•once you have practiced the game can become very relaxing as a break from norm vr gaming
•the game has UGC (custom maps) which help keep content fresh between updates
as one of its active members i may be bias however i think slowp has some major potential and a growth in the community can  help unlock this

reviews.review_title: Bro I got it when it was free!
reviews.review_description: Yay i have a free 14 dollar game now im serious it used to be free now its 14 dollars and i got it for free yay.
Good for its price.

I love the game, but there is one problem I have. I feel like every map is the exact same thing. It all terrain park and not really open world skiing. It would be really good if there were bigger maps that focused on trails and western like mountains. Besides that I think the game is very good.

developer_response.body:
Hey! Thanks for your feedback, improving the experience based on them is the only path to becoming a great game. 
We will be creating bigger maps every now and then. Did you check Pathfinder's Peak mountain? 
Happy Shredding.

reviews.review_description:
-THE BEST SNOWBOARD GAME-

Better than meta's official game carve, I love the realism in slowp while carve is pretty unrealistic. 

Community and official made maps are great, physics are great, controls are great

Great game overall

Genuinely LOVE this game, though something I feel would be cool to have added is a trail behind your snowboard/skis 

It wouldn't have to be an indent in the snow but just a little overlay to be put onto the snow. It's not much but I feel it could benefit the feel of the game and make it that little bit more immersive.

developer_response.body: Hey, so cool that you love Slowp 💙❄️! We also think that trails would add a lot to the immersiveness. We are studying a way to add it with good performance. Cheers!

reviews.review_title: Great game, a few things tho
reviews.review_description: I would give this 5 stars, but the creator tends to look at 4 stars more often, so good things first, it is cool and realistic, there’s lots of maps, you can play public servers or private servers, there’s a radio, there’s rewind and restart, there’s slo mo for cool effects and turns, there’s grind rails, and you can make and submit maps. Now bad, as a real life snowboarder, getting on an edge makes you turn sharper, which is not the case in this game, if you are flatter you turn sharper, also private servers are sometimes glitchy and say room is full, even if the code is something like, ghibfdhkbhkfsbusgufvwrbjk, so they should fix that. But overall, 5 star game.

developer_response.body:
Hey MyGuy! 
It's cool that you think Slowp is worth 5 stars (even though you didn't give us them :_ )

We got confused about how you think that if the board is flatter you turn sharper, we designed the experience to be exactly the opposite, where tilting the board on the toe side or heel side will make you carve more instead of slide down. 

Maybe there was a bug? Please let us know if the experience is still like this. 
Happy shredding.

reviews.review_description: Five whole stars. At the moment of me writing this review, 3 stars, but I know this game's potential. Things that can improve the game: A large lobby system that allows actual slope maps, not pump tracks or parks. You spawn in there, in one out of like three lobby rooms, and you get to start votes for maps like the skate 3 districts, the start map, Mt wiac, kami kanyon, etc. The player count should then be like 30. That'd be AWESOME, 30 whole players in a large room. Room types. So I'm not a fan of park maps because it's hard to get initial speed, and some people love park maps. There should be some rooms that allow for slope maps, pump maps, parks, etc, and allow for some separation. That's my review for now. Respect to you, Bunny Joker.
It’s really fun but I can’t figure out how to switch maps

developer_response.body: Hi! You get to another level by opening the menu using the Meta Menu button (3 lines on the left controller), and navigating to Explore > Levels or Community Levels. There are more than 50 official levels and more than 1400 community-made levels.

reviews.review_description: The game is vary fun 🤩 and there are so ￼ many  maps and a vary god and nice community ￼￼

I tried the free demo on X-mas day, pressed the start button and then I was like WTF?!?!  Within 5 sec I was slammin downhill at breakneck speed! The thrill factor is off the charts. As a huge fan of SSX 3, i can say that snowboarding in VR is next-level. I play seated, and as soon as I figured out that rotating the controllers was the secret to carving, I was hooked. Since the game was only $15 CAD, I also gifted a copy for a friend.  Question: How do you jump, and any chance you could assign a button to “crouch and release” to jump?

This game is great but I need to know how you can turn off your past runs, like how it shows yourself going down the trail. After I keep completing it I can’t see the trail at all. Is there a way to turn this off?

developer_response.body: Hey! You can disable other players replays by opening the ingame menu > explore > online replays. In there you can disable the player’s replays for time, score and coins
